entries.name: Active
entries.description: Peer is currently advertising active AFT participation.

entries.name: Suspended
entries.description: Peer is temporarily suspended by its controller or a relevant registry, consortium, or trust framework.

entries.name: Revoked
entries.description: Peer participation or credential status has been revoked and new events SHOULD NOT be accepted without exceptional policy.

entries.name: Deprecated
entries.description: Peer or capability is being phased out and SHOULD NOT be used for new high-value integrations.

entries.name: Under Review
entries.description: Peer is under review due to incident, dispute, governance, or conformance concerns.

entries.name: Compromised
entries.description: Peer key, endpoint, identity, or operational control is suspected or confirmed compromised.

entries.name: Unknown
entries.description: Peer status is unknown or cannot currently be verified.
